text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One early afternoon, I'm headed toward my
office, when...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Grass! I heard you beat Spe!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Well, that match was, um... a different
grade, you see...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh! So, you overheard us! There's this
cool competition happening in the shopping
district! It's called...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
The "Take On the Legendary Special Week! ★
Oodles of Noodles Ramen-Eating Challenge"!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear that? They're calling Spe legendary
now! Doesn't that sound amazing?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And guess what! I asked the ramen shop owner
and there are two spots available!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So we should both sign up, Grass!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But Urara... Could you actually finish a meal like
that? You always eat less than me during lunch.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: It'll be fine! I'll just skip breakfast!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, the question is whether it is really that
simple...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah, now that I think about it... We're talking about becoming legends here. So, as much as it hurts me to say it...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'll just have to skip my carrot ice cream, too! I'll
sacrifice it all to beat Spe!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Urara...
choice_data_list: Let's beat her in a race instead!
We gotta take on this challenge!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Racing is so much more exciting than
just stuffing your face.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hohoho... That's true!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ramen would fill up my belly, but racing fills up my soul!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Okey-dokey! I'll become a legend by racing
instead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the help of Grass Wonder, Haru Urara just
narrowly avoids an overfull stomach and a
bellyache.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm going to become a legend! The
Legendary Urara!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My, what strong resolve you have! I hope both of
you put up a good fight, then.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Did you not just exclaim "We gotta take on this challenge!"? Well, you have my full support!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! You're gonna try too, Trainer? Yippee!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Let's both give it our all! Then we'll be legends
together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We find out the "legendary" Spe is quite the
ferocious opponent. When it's all said and done, I
decide to take a break from even looking at
ramen for the next few weeks...
